EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITimeZoneFactory3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Time Zone Factory.

[Guid("13A006D4-C2E5-44AF-B641-A09DB8216761")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITimeZoneFactory3 : ITimeZoneFactory2, ITimeZoneFactory

Get the display name, and long display name if it exists, for the time zone ID.

QueryTimeZoneOlsonIDFromWindowsID(string, bool)

Returns the time zone olson ID that corresponds to the given time zone windows ID and respecting daylight saving time.

WindowsID string
respectsDST bool
